_comment: Glare/tilt stress set — REAL admin phone captures of holofoil full-art cards (stored in the scan-diagnostics bucket), labeled by eye 2026-07-10. The 'fail' rows are captures the current matcher gets WRONG (heavy foil glare + tilt); their true cards are all also in the clean scan-ground-truth.json set (same cards, harder captures), so they're definitely in the index — a controlled A/B. The 'guard' rows are glare captures the current matcher gets RIGHT; a fix must not regress them. Used by scripts/scan-replay.ts.
